features_in_release: Site PD Overview - Asset-Level Deep Data Extraction (Phase 5)
Daily Operational Logs with OCR Camera Capture
IPEC PD Monitoring Dashboard - Region-wise bar charts with asset drill-down
IPEC Analytics - Real data criticality distribution, regional risk, asset type breakdown, top-risk tables
IPEC Map View - Leaflet map with IPEC substation markers, lat/lng from SQL report sync
IPEC Criticality Trend Analysis - Degrading/Improving widgets with sparklines, configurable threshold, substation & asset level history
IPEC Increase Flags - Synced from PD Activity report, Dashboard alert banner, Analytics two-panel widget (Two Week / Six Month)
